message:
fix(fcp-mesh): resolve planner compile errors from Custom variant migration

AdjustmentFactor::Custom changed from unit to tuple variant (String)
for placement policy descriptions. Remove Copy derive (incompatible
with String), update all test constructors, and fix semver comparison
to use string-based comparison.

Verified: 1076/1076 fcp-mesh lib tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
